title: Revenue-Driving Custom CMS (ARC) & Corporate Websites Platform
description: Led the strategy, development, and launch of a bespoke Content Management System (ARC) and multiple interconnected corporate websites. This platform serves as the core marketing infrastructure, directly supporting over $1 billion in annual company revenue by enhancing lead generation, website traffic, and operational scalability.

title: Transformative TV Signage Platform Overhaul with Major Cost Savings
description: Spearheaded a Product Manager-level initiative to overhaul an outdated, costly TV signage platform. Proposed and implemented a mini PC solution cutting hardware costs by $300,000. Rebuilt the platform's website from scratch, integrating QR lead capture and admin tools, which boosted lead generation by 8%.

title: Foundational Software Architecture for $1B+ Revenue Support
description: Architected and developed foundational software solutions, including website frameworks and CMS integrations, that underpinned Gehan Homes’ successful rebranding to Brightland Homes. These systems became instrumental in supporting over $1 billion in annual revenue.

title: Explosive E-commerce Sales Growth (259%)
description: Drove substantial e-commerce growth by meticulously optimizing product listings on Magento and other platforms, leading to a remarkable 259% sales increase within the first three months.

title: Corporate Website Performance & Engagement Boost
description: Led the development and launch of a custom corporate website, focusing on performance and user experience. Successfully doubled PageSpeed Insights scores from 30 to 60 points and increased average user engagement time by 40%.

title: Strategic Multi-Platform API Integrations for Marketing Enhancement
description: Engineered a suite of robust REST APIs using Node.js Express to integrate key marketing and sales platforms including HubSpot, Zillow, Realtor.com, Facebook, Google Ads, and Google Analytics 4. This enhanced lead generation, enabled dynamic advertising, and streamlined data synchronization.

title: HubSpot CRM Enhancement for Marketing Productivity
description: Designed and implemented programmable CRM modules and custom objects within HubSpot. This initiative streamlined designer workflows, automated inventory pricing emails, and boosted overall marketing team productivity by 15%.

title: Google Maps API Optimization for Annual Cost Savings
description: Strategically analyzed and optimized the Google Maps API implementation across company platforms, resulting in $50,000 in annual cost savings which were redirected to other key initiatives.

title: In-House Development Initiative Yielding Significant Savings
description: Championed and executed in-house development for critical website and ARC CMS features, saving $40,000 compared to projected agency costs (equivalent to eight weeks of agency work).

title: Vendor Dependency Reduction and Annual Savings
description: Proactively reduced dependency on third-party vendors by taking on complex in-house development tasks, saving an estimated $30,000 annually in contractor costs and improving project agility.

title: Multi-Channel E-commerce Expansion & Consistent Revenue Growth
description: Successfully expanded e-commerce sales channels to Amazon EU, eBay, Walmart, Newegg, Shopify, and Magento. This strategy resulted in an average revenue increase of 30% year-over-year.

title: HubSpot Rollout & Migration with Cost Avoidance
description: Played a key role in the company-wide HubSpot rollout, efficiently handling data transfer from the legacy CRM (Lasso). This saved approximately $15,000 in contractor costs and ensured a smooth transition. Also introduced HubSpot custom objects for dynamic page creation.

title: Dynamic Landing Page System for Increased Lead Generation
description: Created and implemented dynamic landing pages that seamlessly integrated promotional data with HubSpot and TV platforms. Developed custom feeds for Zillow and Realtor.com, optimizing promotional processes and generating a 10% increase in lead generation.

title: Advanced Marketing Analytics & Reporting Tools Implementation
description: Introduced and managed a suite of new marketing analytics tools, including Google Analytics, Data Studio (Looker Studio), website heatmaps, and HubSpot API reports. This initiative improved marketing data clarity by 20% and campaign effectiveness by 12%.

title: Facebook Dynamic Ads Program via Custom Inventory Sync
description: Developed a custom program to synchronize inventory data with Facebook, replacing the third-party service Feedonomics. This enabled highly targeted Dynamic Ad campaigns, significantly enhancing advertising efficiency.

title: Website Redesign & Rebranding Project Leadership
description: Supported the Gehan Homes website rebrand to Brightland Homes with meticulous SEO planning and rollover strategies. Subsequently launched the redesigned website, incorporating thorough QA, team training, and dynamic content, improving user engagement by 10%.

title: Initial Product Roadmap for Custom CMS (ARC)
description: As product owner, spearheaded the creation of the initial product roadmap for a custom website and CMS (ARC). This foundational work laid the critical groundwork for the subsequent 2023-2024 project, strategically aimed at reducing external vendor reliance.

title: Enhanced Click-Through Rates via User Behavior Analysis
description: Utilized Google Analytics, Google Ads, and Tag Manager to analyze user behavior, leading to website optimizations that resulted in a 12% increase in click-through rates.

title: Marketing & Development Workflow Optimization
description: Developed custom WordPress modules and streamlined workflows between marketing and development teams, accelerating project delivery speed by 10%.

title: API Consolidation & Database Query Optimization for Efficiency
description: Achieved $4,000 in annual savings by consolidating APIs and optimizing database queries, which also improved overall system efficiency and performance.

title: E-commerce Operational Efficiency Improvement
description: Conducted daily data analysis of pricing, inventory, advertising, and shipping performance using Google Analytics and Data Studio, improving operational efficiency by 20%.

title: SEO Strategy Implementation for Increased Product Visibility
description: Developed and executed SEO-focused marketing strategies that boosted product visibility by 18%, attracting more qualified users to product listings.

title: Website Stability Improvement through QA & Feature Proposal
description: Conducted meticulous manual web testing and proposed innovative features based on reporting metrics and user feedback, reducing site errors by 15%.

title: GIT Version Control Implementation for Web Projects
description: Implemented GIT version control for all in-house web projects, significantly improving project stability, team collaboration, and code management practices.

title: Design of New Inventory Database for Dynamic Feeds
description: Designed a new inventory database utilizing BDX XML feeds, MongoDB, and SFTP storage, enabling dynamic feeds for HubSpot, Facebook, and Zillow, and providing crucial flexibility for future integrations.

title: Reduced Defect Resolution Time in Front-End Testing
description: Provided technical assistance in testing, modified quality testing processes, and meticulously evaluated and reported software defects via JIRA. Coordinated with development teams to create and execute comprehensive test plans, scenarios, and cases, reducing defect resolution time by 25%.

title: High Customer Satisfaction Rate through Efficient Service
description: Improved customer experience by efficiently handling inquiries and resolving issues, achieving and maintaining a 95% customer satisfaction rate.

title: Redirect Service Website Development Cost Aversion
description: Developed a dedicated service website for GPH/WH redirects, proactively averting $1,500 in potential third-party service costs.

title: Executive Presentations on Technical Upgrades & Savings
description: Delivered polished, impactful presentations to DRB Homes’ executive team post-merger, effectively showcasing technical upgrades, substantial cost savings, and infrastructure improvements that supported strategic decision-making.
